query:
-- تحديث enum الحالات في appointments
ALTER TABLE `appointments` MODIFY COLUMN `status` enum('pending','contacted','no_answer','confirmed','attended','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';

-- إضافة أعمدة توثيق الوقت لـ appointments
ALTER TABLE `appointments` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `contactedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `confirmedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `attendedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancelledAt` timestamp NULL;

-- تحديث enum الحالات في offerLeads
ALTER TABLE `offerLeads` MODIFY COLUMN `status` enum('pending','contacted','no_answer','confirmed','attended','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';

-- إضافة أعمدة توثيق الوقت لـ offerLeads
ALTER TABLE `offerLeads` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `contactedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `confirmedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `attendedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancelledAt` timestamp NULL;

-- تحديث enum الحالات في campRegistrations
ALTER TABLE `campRegistrations` MODIFY COLUMN `status` enum('pending','contacted','no_answer','confirmed','attended','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';

-- إضافة أعمدة توثيق الوقت لـ campRegistrations
ALTER TABLE `campRegistrations` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `contactedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `confirmedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `attendedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancelledAt` timestamp NULL;

SELECT 'Done' as result;
